rulings.Case Title: JACK STURGES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Moore Bros.¿ motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing welding blankets attributable to defendant. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH THORNTON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Intervenors Fireman¿s Fund Insurance Co. and Unigard Insurance Co.¿s (on behalf of their suspended insured, Heatec, Inc.) motion for summary judgment is denied. By not presenting responses to contention discovery, defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant¿s insured. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH THORNTON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Albay Construction Company¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. The declaration of Mr. Riley creates a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing insulation attributable to defendant. The objections to Mr. Riley¿s declaration are overruled. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GARRY EASLEY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant T.W. Smith Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied. The declaration of Mr. Shaw creates a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing pipe attributable to defendant. The objections to Mr. Shaw¿s declaration are overruled. Defendant failed to properly notice or identify the issues in its separate statement for which it seeks summary adjudication. = (220/HEK)
